subject: [PATCH v3 08/11] mm: handle PMD swap entries in UFFDIO_MOVE

2026-07-03.patch_summary: This patch adds support for moving PMD-level swap entries in the UFFDIO_MOVE operation. It introduces a new function, move_swap_pmd(), which moves the swap entry whole-PMD and re-anchors the PMD-sized swap-cache folio's anon rmap to the destination VMA. The patch also updates the dispatcher in move_pages_huge_pmd() to wait for migration on a PMD migration entry and route PMD swap entries through move_swap_pmd(). This ensures that UFFDIO_MOVE operations can handle PMD swap entries correctly, even when they are swapped out.
